title: Korea Surpasses Canada as World’s Seventh-Largest Stock Market
description: South Korea’s equity market has overtaken Canada’s as the world’s seventh largest, propelled by insatiable demand for chips powering artificial intelligence.
content:
South Korea’s equity market has overtaken Canada’s as the world’s seventh largest, propelled by insatiable demand for chips powering artificial intelligence.

title: In OpenAI trial, former technology chief says Sam Altman sowed 'chaos,' distrust among top executives
description: A former OpenAI executive testified that CEO Sam Altman created distrust among leaders. This testimony emerged during Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI. Musk claims the company abandoned its nonprofit goals. The trial could significantly impact the future of artificial intelligence development and deployment.

title: How AI bots hired over 260 candidates at Piramal Finance
description: Piramal Finance, a non-bank financier, hired 262 entry-level sales executives entirely using an artificial intelligence (AI) bot.
content: In the three months to March, Piramal Finance—a non-bank financier with assets of over ₹1 trillion—hired 262 entry-level sales executives entirely using an artificial intelligence (AI) bot. Human involvement came only at the final stage of issuing of... [5664 chars]

title: AI Diplomacy: US-China Relations Enter New Dimension
description: Washington and Beijing are contemplating official discussions on artificial intelligence as part of a summit next week between President Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping. The U.S. is led by Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent for the talks, but Beijing has not yet named its representative.
